proposition: Ex parte relief requires irreparable injury or loss before notice can be given/hearing held.
official_text_exact: An ex parte order may be entered if it clearly appears from specific facts shown by verified complaint, affidavit, or other proof that irreparable injury, loss, or damage will result from delay required to give notice.

proposition: Relevant evidence is evidence having any tendency to make a consequential fact more or less probable.
official_text_exact: Evidence is relevant if it has any tendency to make a fact more or less probable than it would be without the evidence and the fact is of consequence in determining the action.
